textByHash.120cbe04c55baa66f7f7b83969f6e2aa0594eabe: What news do you bring? Have you made progress with the main directive?
textByHash.19669ff64f626510ac51f3389bb5984920e9091e: Welcome comrade. Now we may speak properly.
textByHash.19fa00920522a037af1c62adf22368b8306e2581: What? Comrade, I think you need your head examined when you get back.
textByHash.3ac1e4d41c1a8722501a762cb8018de906ea0b4c: You should check in with the operatives in Lumbridge before you head to the outpost. They might have some news for you to take as well.
textByHash.46fc5237b2f8ecdca91e2dcc6d853e25f70e13ce: Comrade! You really do have a funny sense of humour. No, our people live in the great city of Palingrad, of course. Ah, home, I miss it.
textByHash.482d69a1d138ba75fb7fc589c35c6c3d0e745fc2: How do you not know the phrase, comrade?
textByHash.4e98748ff879680adc87c86359a4d566f4dc19bf: This caused you to fly... ingenious.
textByHash.53065e5d354f012a81c50d06aa694b257b920ae8: Operatives must not speak without giving the proper greeting. You have not given the proper greeting and until you do I have nothing more to say.
textByHash.56a3b479dd0934d8c7bb32462eed0b6ccbb6f7ec: No one left before it was given out. I was one of the first operatives to leave, and I know it.
textByHash.6254d719638a1ae74df89c1f904fc04ab03cf288: So, tell them the phrase. It's not exactly hard to remember. Pescaling Pax has a strange sense of humour.
textByHash.639b3e2e0ff56f74669ba91fae62f8aa9ee1f693: I am sorry comrade, but you still have not shown me the proper greeting.
textByHash.6e1bd75b14bfb58cf8719e8f5e8dad66b011447f: This is very amazing. I will make note of it in my mission report.
textByHash.74d37946f45826af5c5b80d225b698e07d8421c5: Who cares? It's the entire reason we are in this wretched cage! We need to learn the secrets of flight, and the best way is to get these gullible humans to reveal it to us unwittingly. Blast them and their thumbs.
textByHash.7dbff08118505520bef5cc7c761cf6471b2044b9: You flapped a lot? I didn't think we could fly like other birds.
textByHash.7f026d4fd8e399b1c378e34be04ebbf1bbd17fe3: As you are a comrade, I suppose it is my duty to help you.
textByHash.80019bd5696f3ab740cdecced6e0e38fae9ede61: And you are speaking in the common tongue. So, what is your point?
textByHash.87c08782a6e0f1ec5e215e8b9eed42ff64bd2ae3: If only. The Pescallion has declared that until we have finished our research of the southern species and have developed our great plan, we may not return. So I am stuck here observing humans.
textByHash.882b385f09e4f902c91276a25bc3c642308a7b67: Pescaling Pax. The Pescallion's son. Well, one of them. He's in charge of research and development at our headquarters.
textByHash.9595d462763a1c9ab9a6603bebb35e4f93e551e5: You could take my mission report back to the outpost for me. I don't want to risk breaking out and blowing our cover.
textByHash.a88295ad9f664e17ad82a651df32ab5f03e8b870: The phrase is 'Do not trust the walrus'.
textByHash.ac89a027f2bc5d23b3169cf000d2d9e002df3bc4: What do you think you are doing?
textByHash.bb9fdbcb66eaee94459c114506d8b906887cefbd: Thank you comrade. This is like a taste of the motherland. The phrase is 'Do not trust the walrus.'
textByHash.cc40b46562e0c88788f51aac990dec47906c7265: A hot air balloon? This contraption made you fly?
textByHash.d6e766e5ebffcd90df920e40e3935823d6bce577: Haa haa haa... oh you have me in stitches.
textByHash.e551e71b66133e546c897b0caa8389611b02c583: Yes, I am. I'm tired of observing these humans and being gawked at by nasty little children. I miss the fresh codfish of our motherland.
textByHash.ecf3c2d0174157ce5270c010921677ed2e607de9: I see you have some raw cod with you comrade. I might be willing to exchange information for it, if you are willing.
textByHash.f1954c44a3d8153d4c803d85d64837ec42553ac7: It was easy!? It was easy to learn how to FLY?
textByHash.f36dad15c4f850bf69bb47a04cedd279713bffbd: Haa haa haa, that is a funny joke. I like your sense of humour comrade. It would be like asking 'Where is the motherland'.
textByHash.f395740ed5d7bbd0ce2be82ef585c6a21ff4d650: I am sorry comrade, but I cannot break protocol without good reason.
